creator: Clockwork6400@protonmail.com
text:
Change

* take maintainership
* update PORTVERSION to 1.0.5.
* PORTREVISION to 2. I believe that DISTVERSION should have been in that place, but in the original version it was not indicated, so I did not dare.
* removed 4 files from pkg-plist. Because checking the check-orphans cursed for errors because of them.
* portlint > looks fine
* portclippy and portfmt checks
* build in jail 13.1-RELEASE-p6 amd64 was successful. I didn't run the program after build for testing!
